title: Command Lifecycle, Main Boundary, and Decomposition · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed maintenance review reconstructs command lifecycle, main boundary, and decomposition from repository state, input bytes, decoded text, tokens, counters, ranking keys, report records, stdout, stderr, exit status, tests, package artifact, and release evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for testable command lifecycle and function map after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence…
objectives: Keep import-safe definitions separate from the __main__ execution boundary and return an exit status from main.
Decompose admission, decoding, normalization, tokenization, counting, ranking, formatting, and orchestration into explicit contracts.
Keep deterministic text transformations pure and pass filesystem, stream, clock, and terminal effects through a thin shell.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-bookbot-python cumulative Unicode-safe text-analysis portfolio.

Browser execution uses original fixed in-memory fixtures and deterministic pure-Python models only.
Host files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, package installation, native profiling, load,
operating-system races, publication, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class TextPolicy:
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    normalization: str = "NFC"
    casefold: bool = True
    top_k: int = 10


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    corpus_id: str
    revision: str
    policy_version: str
    command_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Bookbot portfolio ready"

steps.title: Bookbot and Python Main Boundary · changed case · Review Main Boundary
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Bookbot team handles case 5150 during a large-file migration rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to separate import-safe definitions, a pure analysis core, explicit effects, and command status; preserve original text and offsets beside every normalized comparison key and report exclusion; then split one word and one UTF-8 sequence across stream chunks and compare batch output byte-for-byte. Browser code uses pure bounded functions and original fixed fixtures only. Real files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, packages, installations, native profiling, operating-system races, load, publication, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

This does not satisfy Command Trace for testable command lifecycle and function map.

steps.title: Bookbot and Python Record what required effort · Review Command Trace
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Command Trace: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review Bookbot team handles case 1007 during an offline public-library reading report. Build deterministic Python evidence to separate import-safe definitions, a pure analysis core, explicit effects, and command status; keep browser work pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of host file, process, Git, package-install, credential, and release effects; then move the input through a symlink outside the allowed root and reject it without reading content. Browser code uses pure bounded functions and original fixed fixtures only. Real files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, packages, installations, native profiling, operating-system races, load, publication, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Retain invocation, tested revision, input identity, stdout, stderr, exit status, duration, and environment boundary as one run record.

Evidence target: Bookbot and Python Record what required effort · Review Command Trace.
steps.why: Retrieving Command Trace through the concrete testable command lifecycle and function map case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Retain invocation, tested revision, input identity, stdout, stderr, exit status, duration, and environment boundary as one run record.
